pricingGuidance: Kitchen remodeling costs vary based on cabinets, countertops, layout changes, plumbing, electrical work, appliances, materials, and finishes. A more detailed request helps professionals respond with better context instead of repeating basic questions later.
timelineGuidance: Smaller kitchen updates may move faster, while larger remodels often involve planning, materials, measurements, scheduling, and trade coordination. A guided request helps communicate what stage the project is in.
